overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features working navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data, with occasional lightning illuminating the dark ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel through rough seas, monitoring the radar and navigation screens

entered.detail: digital chart plotter displaying map with yellow landmass
rotating radar display with yellow sweep arm
depth sounder showing brown seabed and blue water column
forward deck of the vessel with railings and equipment
dark choppy water with visible wave patterns
dark gray storm clouds covering the horizon

segments.scene_description: The vessel moves steadily through dark stormy waters at night, viewed from the enclosed bridge. Three navigation monitors display radar, charts, and depth data while the bow cuts through choppy waves.

events.description: lightning bolt strikes on the port side, briefly illuminating the ocean surface
bright lightning flash fills the forward view with white light

agents.ego_description: continuing navigation through the storm as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: bright jagged lightning strike visible on the port side horizon

segments.scene_description: A lightning storm intensifies around the vessel. A bright bolt strikes on the port side, followed by an intense flash that illuminates the entire forward view, revealing the turbulent sea state.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge approaching distant navigation marker

events.description: distant white navigation light becomes visible on the horizon directly ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm, monitoring the approaching navigation light

entered.detail: bright white light from a vessel or lighthouse on the horizon

segments.scene_description: After the lightning subsides, the vessel continues through the dark stormy seas. A distant navigation light appears on the horizon ahead, providing a reference point for navigation as the radar continues its sweep.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a dark, stormy night is momentarily shattered by a violent electrical storm. It begins with the vessel cutting through choppy, dark waters, where the only light comes from three navigation monitors displaying radar and depth data. As the storm intensifies, a bright bolt of lightning strikes the port side, casting an intense flash that momentarily illuminates the turbulent sea state across the entire forward view. Once the flash subsides and darkness returns, the camera continues to track the ship's steady progress through the waves. The scene finally shifts focus toward the horizon, where a distant navigation light emerges as a steady reference point against the sweeping radar.
